author: adityam2
name: Competitive 8xH100 Run17 TTT 1.1187
blurb: 11-layer parameter-banking competitive run on 8xH100 with LeakyReLU^2, XSA4, Bigram+Trigram hash embeddings, ValueResidual, int6+lzma compression, and legal score-first TTT; final metric uses legal_ttt_exact under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
